name: Mom's Heath Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend the brown sugar, flour, and butter using a pastry blender until combined.
2. Remove 1 cup of this mixture and set aside for topping.
3. Mix baking soda into buttermilk with a fork or spoon until just blended.
4. Add egg, vanilla, salt, and the reserved dry ingredient mixture to the bowl. Stir gently until well mixed.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9" x 11" baking pan.
6. Top with the remaining flour-sugar mixture.
7. Finely crush the Heath candy bars (still frozen) and sprinkle over the top of the cake.
8. Add chopped nuts if desired.
9. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes. Serves 8 to 10.
